GatewayExactIdentifier.description: Exact non-empty identifier; whitespace is not normalized.

token.description: Optional caller-supplied bearer token. Omit to have Prodex generate one.
Returned only when Prodex generated or rotated the token for this request.

rotate.description: Generate and return a new bearer token once.

token.description: Optional replacement bearer token. The stored file only keeps its hash.

GatewayRouteDecisionReason.description: Stable snake_case reason label from the canonical versioned route-decision trace.

include_current_state.description: Include the bounded global model-load snapshot. Available only to unscoped principals; scoped callers receive 403.

request.description: Optional request shape used only for pure planning. Prompt and tool content are never returned or audited.

current_load_included.description: Whether the current read-only in-flight/model-load snapshot was included in diagnostic planning.
